text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while Fine Motion is making progress
with her training...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt... Bzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
"Apologies for messaging you out of the blue,
Trainer. I have a request, if you don't mind."

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: "Would it trouble you to become my family?"

text_block_list.name: Diner Staff
text_block_list.text: Welcome! How many today?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Two, please...

text_block_list.name: Diner Staff
text_block_list.text: ...Everything okay?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Don't you need to verify our familial
relation? This is my stepbrother.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Don't you need to verify our familial
relation? This is my stepsister.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that right, dear brother? ♪ We can definitely
eat here, seeing as we're family!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that right, dear sister? ♪ We can definitely
eat here, seeing as we're family!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I finally get a grasp on the situation. It seems
she has taken the term "family restaurant" to
mean only family can dine there.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, of course. I know you don't need any
qualifications to enter a family restaurant.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Since friends can go together, it would be
peculiar for entrance to be restricted to families,
right? Still, I wondered why they were called that.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Then I thought that families might receive some
kind of special service, so I wanted to test my
theory. I thought it was a rather clever idea.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! As thanks for escorting me here, let me
treat you to a "mystery drink." ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Groove was telling me about a child who pressed all the
buttons on the soda dispenser—wait, was she saying
that was bad? Eh, it'll be fine! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I brace myself for my "thank-you gift," I take a
look around the restaurant.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's security team is seated at a nearby
table. It seems she requires protection even when
going out for a meal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way back from the restaurant...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Look, Trainer! I made this purchase all by myself!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I learned all the steps to making purchases—from
locating my wallet to exchanging money for
goods. This was my first successful attempt!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Spending one's allowance on snacks is a staple of
youth, right? Would you call me a full-fledged
student now?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Huzzah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion is overjoyed about buying snacks. I'm
watching the heartwarming display with a smile
when...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I got too excited again. My friends just
talked to me about this too.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: They said I smile at the weirdest times.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I realized I must be making people uncomfortable
and promised myself I'd be careful, but... I must
admit, it slipped my mind.
choice_data_list:
I think they meant it's wonderful that you find
joy in so much.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Aah, ahaha. Yes, I see. What an exquisite
interpretation!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well then! After we finish these snacks, would you
care to go for a little stroll?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm truly grateful to you for training me with so
much care.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
When I was living in the castle, my family and my
security team were always thinking up all kinds of
ways to keep me from getting bored.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Their efforts are what gave birth to my love of all
things fun. All of my memories are full of love and
affection!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I never even imagined wanting to leave—not even
once.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You know, I actually have an elder sister who's an
active racer.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
When she told me that she was leaving the castle
to pursue her career, she asked if I wanted to go
with her.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I refused her at the time. I believed that fulfilling
my duty was more important.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That duty... is to become a pillar of Ireland's
prosperity.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. If I deem it essential to perform that
duty, I'm prepared to drop everything and return
home at a moment's notice.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm only talking about my dedication, of course. If
I was told to go home right away... I'd surely try
to persuade them to reconsider.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
There's still so much I want to learn about Japan! I
think it's a splendid thing to travel the world and
see it with your own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It is not enough just to know the world
intellectually. By touching, confirming, and
experiencing, I've finally learned what true
enjoyment is.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You're right! They're an incredible experience
that you can feel with your own legs!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's something that you can't comprehend unless
you run with everything you have. Real races are
so much more fun than I ever dreamed.
choice_data_list:
And there are still even more wonderful views
waiting for you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You mean... even more wonderful than what I've
seen so far?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: But everything is already so amazing.
choice_data_list: The best is yet to come.
The best is yet to come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She still doesn't know what a high-level race is
like. What she sees from the highest stages will no
doubt take her breath away.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I see. My heart can pound even harder...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Wonderful views, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what kind of race I need to run to see
them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Fine Motion mutters those words, her eyes
sparkle in the evening glow of the setting sun.
